en: You see, I've spent most of my life in Europe. Oh, that's capital.
You shouldn't use words like that. Says who?
ko: 그런 말은 쓰지 말아야 해. 누가 그래?

en: Oh, Meg. She's my older sister. Here.
ko: 오, 메그, 그녀는 내 언니야. 여기.

en: Oh, that's her. See? The girl in the violet dress?
It's very pretty. She reminds me to be good, so Father will be proud of me when he returns.
Where is he? He volunteered for the Union Army, and I wanted to go fight with him.
I can't get over my disappointment in being a girl.
ko: 여자라는 사실에 실망을 극복할 수 없어.

en: Jo, would you like to dance with me? I can't because...
Because of what? You won't tell?
Never. I scorched my dress, see?
There. And Meg told me to keep still so no one would see it.
ko: 저기, 메그가 아무도 보지 않게 가만히 있으라고 했어.

en: You can laugh if you want to, it's funny, I know.
